items.title: Sparks have actually made more shots than the Wings have (25-24), but Dallas holds an edge in points off 3s (18-9) and made free throws (14-10). It’s more than made up for the disparity in paint points (40-30 in favor of the Sparks).
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Sparks have actually made more shots than the Wings have (25-24), but Dallas holds an edge in points off 3s (18-9) and made free throws (14-10). It’s more than made up for the disparity in paint points (40-30 in favor of the Sparks).

items.title: The Sparks trail 68-63 at the end of the third. LA took control for a moment, but Dallas went on a run late and regained momentum.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt: The Sparks trail 68-63 at the end of the third. LA took control for a moment, but Dallas went on a run late and regained momentum.

items.title: End Q3 | Wings 68, Sparks 63 | Los Angeles took a brief lead, but Dallas stormed back to end the quarter. Sparks are dealing with foul trouble, but they’ve hung tough all day. Nneka Ogwumike leads with 13 points and 10 rebounds. Sparks are 3-for-14 on 3s.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: End Q3 | Wings 68, Sparks 63 | Los Angeles took a brief lead, but Dallas stormed back to end the quarter. Sparks are dealing with foul trouble, but they’ve hung tough all day. Nneka Ogwumike leads with 13 points and 10 rebounds. Sparks are 3-for-14 on 3s.

items.title: Halftime: Wings 46, Sparks 40. Los Angeles has shown some real grit so far today; Dallas hit them with some haymakers but they’ve hung around. Sparks shot 49%, but just 2-for-11 on 3s. Dallas made 5 triples. Dearica Hamby has a team-high 8 points. Five players have at least 6.

items.title: The reckless closeout flagrant foul needs to be adjusted at all levels. A defensive player having their feet inside the 3-point line should never be called for a reckless closeout against an offensive player shooting a 3. There’s no reason for that to be considered “reckless.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The reckless closeout flagrant foul needs to be adjusted at all levels. A defensive player having their feet inside the 3-point line should never be called for a reckless closeout against an offensive player shooting a 3. There’s no reason for that to be considered “reckless.”

items.title: Looking to pledge my allegiance and fanaticism to a singular
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Looking to pledge my allegiance and fanaticism to a singular 
English Premier League team. 

I’ve been a fan of the league for a few years but never just one squad. 

Looking for suggestions. My daughter is a Manchester United fan so that’s a no go. 

Open to your suggestions and solicitations. Thnx

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Brooks Thompson. OK St shooter was drafted 27th by ORL in 94. Shot well from 3 but barely played. Traded to UTA in 96 which started nomad phase (DEN, PHO & NY) thru 98. Retired & went into coaching in 98, coaching Tex-SA for yrs. Sadly died too young in 2016.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Brooks Thompson. OK St shooter was drafted 27th by ORL in 94. Shot well from 3 but barely played. Traded to UTA in 96 which started nomad phase (DEN, PHO & NY) thru 98. Retired & went into coaching in 98, coaching Tex-SA for yrs. Sadly died too young in 2016.
